title: Form Column - Need Start Time and End Time AM/PM
excerpt: Hello everyone. I recently started using Monday.com. Excited about the possibilities. We are trying to manage community event requests in our organization. Some events occur across multiple days, some occur for only 1 da…

posts.author: LaShaye (LaShaye Floyd)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello everyone. I recently started using Monday.com. Excited about the possibilities. We are trying to manage community event requests in our organization. Some events occur across multiple days, some occur for only 1 day. Our employees submit requests to be out of the office to support these events. It is extremly helpful to know the time that these events occur so that we can properly plan who will be out of the office and when. Rather than making a general text box and leaving it to form requestors to be consistent with AM, PM, start time, etc. It would be ideal for the column to be formatted in a way which helps make the data input into this column consistent across all requests. Whenever I add the Hour column in the Main table and then try to get this to show on the form, I get an error message that this column type is not supported and to try something else. Very strange to me, but can you please help suggest some other options? If there are no other options please let me know. Maybe a different plugin or a different project management tool that supports this “feature”. If I posted in the wrong forum, please let me know. Thanks in advance!
